title: [FEAT] Update the `pollinations_ai/ompc` package and list community version
author: Circuit-Overtime

gist.headline: Passing the torch
gist.blurb: We've officially passed the baton for the OpenCode plugin to the community! Huge shoutout to @fkom13 for building the new go-to version.
gist.summary: Transitioned the OpenCode plugin to a community-maintained version and updated the packages documentation.
gist.impact: Developers looking to integrate OpenCode will now use the community-supported plugin, streamlining our core packages.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee handing a glowing package or code-plant to a community member (represented by the Monitor Robot), symbolizing the handoff of the OpenCode plugin to the community.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot handing a glowing lime green (#ecf874) wrapped package to a chunky pixel robot with a CRT monitor head. They are standing in a digital garden with small code-plants sprouting. Soft pastel gradient background with lavender and peach. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
